name: Habu's Cudgel
description:
Long associated with a notorious crime boss in Nantambu, this stout +1 striking fearsome club is studded with vicious-looking knobs of obsidian and wrapped in cloth for a better grip. It emits a ghastly groan when swung.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You gesture at a square within 40 feet with Habu's Cudgel. The club causes a frightful wail to unleash from that square and casts () targeting the creature in that square and all adjacent creatures.
